use_codes.desc: USE OF VALSARTAN TO REDUCE CARDIOVASCULAR MORTALITY IN CLINICALLY STABLE PATIENTS WITH LEFT VENTRICULAR FAILURE OR LEFT VENTRICULAR DYSFUNCTION FOLLOWING MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION

indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
Diovan® (valsartan) is indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may be used alone or in combination with other antihypertensive agents.
